languages.text: Оснащение госпиталя оказалось превосходным. Вам удалось получить полезный препарат.

traits.locale_text: Оснащение госпиталя оказалось превосходным. Вам удалось получить полезный препарат.

languages.text: The infirmary turned out to be excellently provisioned. You have managed to obtain a useful substance.
languages.original_text: Оснащение госпиталя оказалось превосходным. Вам удалось получить полезный препарат.

traits.locale_text: The infirmary turned out to be excellently provisioned. You have managed to obtain a useful substance.
The infirmary turned out to be excellently provisioned. You have managed to obtain a useful substance.
The infirmary turned out to be excellently provisioned. You have managed to obtain a useful substance.

languages.text: Die Krankenstation war bestens ausgerüstet. Du bist in den Besitz einer nützlichen Substanz gelangt.
languages.original_text: The infirmary turned out to be excellently provisioned. You have managed to obtain a useful substance.

traits.locale_text: Die Krankenstation war bestens ausgerüstet. Du bist in den Besitz einer nützlichen Substanz gelangt.

languages.text: 事实证明，医务室的物资储备非常充足。你成功弄到了一种有用的药剂。
languages.original_text: The infirmary turned out to be excellently provisioned. You have managed to obtain a useful substance.

traits.locale_text: 事实证明，医务室的物资储备非常充足。你成功弄到了一种有用的药剂。

languages.text: L'infirmerie s'est révélée remarquablement bien approvisionnée. Vous avez réussi à obtenir une substance utile.
languages.original_text: The infirmary turned out to be excellently provisioned. You have managed to obtain a useful substance.

traits.locale_text: L'infirmerie s'est révélée remarquablement bien approvisionnée. Vous avez réussi à obtenir une substance utile.

languages.text: La enfermería resulta estar muy bien aprovisionada y consigues obtener una sustancia bastante útil.
languages.original_text: The infirmary turned out to be excellently provisioned. You have managed to obtain a useful substance.

traits.locale_text: La enfermería resulta estar muy bien aprovisionada y consigues obtener una sustancia bastante útil.

languages.text: Revirin mükemmel şekilde donatıldığı ortaya çıktı. Yararlı bir madde elde etmeyi başardın.
languages.original_text: The infirmary turned out to be excellently provisioned. You have managed to obtain a useful substance.

traits.locale_text: Revirin mükemmel şekilde donatıldığı ortaya çıktı. Yararlı bir madde elde etmeyi başardın.

languages.text: 療養所は、予想以上に備品が充実していた。君が手に入れた有用な物質は、きっと役に立つだろう。
languages.original_text: The infirmary turned out to be excellently provisioned. You have managed to obtain a useful substance.

traits.locale_text: 療養所は、予想以上に備品が充実していた。君が手に入れた有用な物質は、きっと役に立つだろう。
